title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
